title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google released Co-scientist, an AI system that automates scientific discovery and has achieved breakthroughs in cancer treatments, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. A complementary system called Robin uses a consensus mechanism to validate findings across multiple treatment domains including leukemia, drug combinations, and liver fibrosis.
